description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline with graphic print on the chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironVintage styling on a classic t-shirt is a sure fire way of upping your style statement in your off-duty ensembles. This t-shirt from puma ensures you cut a dash at every casual upscale event with its fashionable cut and soccer themed print. Pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 33"
